ValidationRule.description: We can only allow users to change owners to the same OBC tag. GCE team can adjust to other company if needed. TBD/Blank need to be done by GCE
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_LEAD_014: The New Owner does not have the same tag as the Lead, or, the Leadis TBD/Blank. As needed, please pick a different user, or ask GCE to perform special owner transfers
